name: behaviors.propose
description: Propose a new behavior from observed patterns. Triggers auto-approval if confidence >= 0.8 with 3+ historical validations. Follows AGENTS.md Behavior Lifecycle: DISCOVER -> PROPOSE -> APPROVE -> INTEGRATE.

name.description: Behavior name (must follow 'behavior_<verb>_<noun>' pattern, e.g., behavior_prevent_secret_leaks)

description.description: Brief description of what the behavior does

instruction.description: Procedural instruction defining how to apply the behavior (include numbered steps)

role_focus.description: Primary role that uses this behavior (Student for routine, Teacher for examples, Strategist for novel patterns)

confidence_score.description: Confidence score 0.0-1.0. Score >= 0.8 with 3+ historical_validations triggers auto-approval.

historical_validations.description: Array of run_ids that validated this pattern. Need 3+ for auto-approval eligibility.

trigger_keywords.description: Keywords that trigger this behavior (used in Quick Triggers table)

pattern_id.description: Optional TraceAnalysisService pattern ID that triggered this proposal

rationale.description: Rationale for why this behavior should exist (required for Teacher review)

proposed_by_role.description: Role of the agent proposing (Student escalates, Strategist emits new behaviors)

role_context.description: Optional role context for telemetry (emphasized but not required)

behavior_id.description: Unique identifier for the proposed behavior

auto_approved.description: True if behavior was auto-approved (confidence >= 0.8 with 3+ validations)

confidence_score.description: The confidence score provided in the proposal

needs_teacher_review.description: True if behavior requires Teacher validation

message.description: Human-readable message about the proposal result
